name: DockPanePluginAttribute
summary: Optional attribute for use with an DockPanePlugin derived class. If this attribute is not used, the default values are the same as using a DockPanePluginAttribute(100,100)

constructors.name: DockPanePluginAttribute(int, int)
constructors.summary: Constructor DockPanePluginAttribute, takes a pair of values that specify the prefered size for the pane. Default values are: MinimumWidth=0, MinimumHeight=0, AutoScroll=true, FixedSize=true.

properties.name: AutoScroll
properties.summary: Determines if scroll bars should appear when the pane gets bellow it's minimum size

properties.name: FixedSize
properties.summary: Determines if the pane should be resizable

properties.name: MinimumHeight
properties.summary: Minimum height of pane, 0 means no preference

properties.name: MinimumWidth
properties.summary: Minimum width of pane, 0 means no preference

properties.name: PreferredHeight
properties.summary: Preferred height of pane, 0 means no preference

properties.name: PreferredWidth
properties.summary: Preferred width of pane, 0 means no preference
